---
title: "01explore-and-check-assumptions"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(ggplot2) #creating plots
library(tidyverse) #data cleaning 
library(here) #managing directories, points to Rproj as working directory
library(DataExplorer) #probably won't use, auto generates exploratory analysis
library(gt) #for creating tables

all_data<- read_csv(here("data","clean_data.csv"),show_col_types = FALSE)
between_subj <- read_csv(here("data"),"between_subj.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
```
```{r}

```
